---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaves unexpectedly
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what is wrong.

## To reproduce

The smallest possible code that reproduces the issue. Wrap it in a
fenced code block.

```python
# minimal reproducer here
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. If there is a traceback, include the full
traceback in a code block.

## Environment

- nuggetindex version (`pip show nuggetindex`):
- Python version (`python --version`):
- Operating system:
- Extractor (commercial / open-weight / Ollama / other):

## Additional context

Anything else that might help us reproduce the issue.
